Event: The Card Mole-opoly

Other locations the gear can be found

Cheater Deck

Triggers: Once in a while

The unit draws a card. Depending on the card, the unit deals 100000 physical, magic, or pure damage to a random enemy. If the unit draws a joker, all three effects are triggered on the same enemy simultaneously.

Requirements: 90-100
